summary: Tested Employee Deactivation Enhancement feature. All backend tests (10/11) passed - 1 error was due to temporary 502 (preview environment starting). All frontend UI tests passed. The deactivation form modal, inactive type filter, and inactive type column are all working correctly.

features_tested.deactivation_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking trash icon opens deactivation form modal
features_tested.modal_date_field: PASS - Date field present with date picker
features_tested.modal_type_dropdown: PASS - Type dropdown with Relieved/Terminated/Completed Internship options
features_tested.modal_last_day_payable: PASS - Last Day Payable dropdown (Yes/No) present
features_tested.inactive_type_filter: PASS - Inactive Type filter dropdown in employee list with All/Relieved/Terminated/Completed Internship options
features_tested.inactive_type_column: PASS - Inactive Type column visible in employee table showing badge for inactive employees or '-' for active
features_tested.backend_delete_with_body: PASS - DELETE /api/employees/{id} accepts body with inactive_type, inactive_date, reason, last_day_payable
features_tested.backend_stores_deactivation_data: PASS - Deactivation fields stored correctly in database (is_deleted=true, inactive_type, inactive_date, inactive_reason, last_day_payable)
features_tested.backend_user_deactivated: PASS - User account is_active set to false when employee deactivated
features_tested.backend_inactive_type_filter: PASS - GET /api/employees?inactive_type=Terminated&include_deleted=true returns only terminated employees
features_tested.backend_active_not_affected: PASS - Active employees not affected by deactivation filters
features_tested.backend_default_values: PASS - Deactivation without body uses default values (inactive_type=Terminated, last_day_payable=false)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend deactivate_employee() at line 2762 correctly parses optional JSON body for deactivation form data
Backend stores all deactivation fields: inactive_type, inactive_date, inactive_reason, last_day_payable, deactivated_by
Backend get_employees() at line 1855 correctly supports inactive_type filter with include_deleted parameter
Frontend Employees.js correctly sends deactForm data with axios DELETE request using data parameter
Frontend deactivation modal has all required fields with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend Inactive Type filter correctly passes include_deleted=true when filtering by inactive type
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test employees with TEST_ prefix for deactivation testing. These were deactivated with different inactive_type values (Terminated, Relieved, Completed Internship) to verify the feature.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Deactivation Enhancement feature fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Deactivation form modal replaces simple confirmation dialog with fields for inactive_type, inactive_date, reason, last_day_payable. 2) Inactive Type filter dropdown in employee list filters by Relieved/Terminated/Completed Internship. 3) Inactive Type column in employee table shows badge for deactivated employees. 4) Backend DELETE /api/employees/{id} accepts JSON body with deactivation data. 5) Backend GET /api/employees supports inactive_type query param with include_deleted=true.
